name: Artisan
text: +1 Card. Gain a card to your hand costing up to $5. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Bandit
text: Gain a Gold. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them that is a Treasure other than Copper, and discards the rest.

name: Bureaucrat
text: Gain a Silver onto your deck. Each other player reveals a Victory card from their hand and puts it onto their deck (or reveals a hand with no Victory cards).

name: Cellar
text: +1 Action. Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Chapel
text: Trash up to 4 cards from your hand.

name: Council Room
text: +4 Cards. +1 Buy. Each other player draws a card.

name: Festival
text: +2 Actions. +1 Buy. +$2.

name: Gardens
text: Worth 1VP per 10 cards you have (rounded down).

name: Harbinger
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: Laboratory
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action.

name: Library
text: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand, skipping any Action cards you choose to; set those aside, discarding them afterwards.

name: Market
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Merchant
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. The first time you play a Silver this turn, +$1.

name: Militia
text: +$2. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Mine
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Gain a Treasure to your hand costing up to $3 more than it.

name: Moat
text: +2 Cards. When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from your hand, to be unaffected by it.

name: Moneylender
text: You may trash a Copper from your hand for +$3.

name: Poacher
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. +$1. Discard a card per empty Supply pile.

name: Remodel
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Sentry
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Trash and/or discard any number of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Smithy
text: +3 Cards.

name: Throne Room
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Vassal
text: +$2. Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action card, you may play it.

name: Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions.

name: Witch
text: +2 Cards. Each other player gains a Curse.

name: Workshop
text: Gain a card costing up to $4.

name: Baron
text: +1 Buy. You may discard an Estate for +$4. If you don't, gain an Estate.

name: Bridge
text: This turn, cards cost $1 less (but not less than $0). +1 Buy. +$1.

name: Conspirator
text: +$2. If you've played 3 or more Actions this turn (counting this): +1 Card, +1 Action.

name: Courtier
text: Reveal a card from your hand. For each type it has, choose one (must be different): +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$3; gain a Gold.

name: Courtyard
text: +3 Cards. Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Diplomat
text: +2 Cards. If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand (after drawing): +2 Actions. When another player plays an Attack, you may reveal this (if you have ≥5 cards in hand) to draw 2 cards then discard 3.

name: Duke
text: Worth 1VP per Duchy you have.

name: Ironworks
text: Gain a card costing up to $4. If the gained card is an Action: +1 Action. Treasure: +$1. Victory: +1 Card.

name: Lurker
text: +1 Action. Choose one: Trash an Action card from the Supply; or gain an Action card from the Trash.

name: Masquerade
text: +2 Cards. Each player with any cards in hand passes one to the next player to their left, at once. Then you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Mill
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. You may discard 2 cards for +$2. (1VP)

name: Mining Village
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. You may trash this card immediately for +$2.

name: Minion
text: +1 Action. Choose one: +$2; or discard your hand, +4 Cards, and each other player with 5+ cards in hand discards their hand and draws 4 cards.

name: Nobles
text: Choose one: +3 Cards; or +2 Actions. (2VP)

name: Patrol
text: +3 Cards. Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Victory cards and Curses into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Pawn
text: Choose two different options: +1 Card; +1 Action; +1 Buy; +$1.

name: Replace
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to $2 more. If the gained card is an Action or Treasure, put it on your deck. If it's a Victory card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Secret Passage
text: +2 Cards. +1 Action. Take a card from your hand and put it anywhere in your deck.

name: Shanty Town
text: +2 Actions. Reveal your hand. If you have no Action cards in hand, +2 Cards.

name: Steward
text: Choose one: +2 Cards; or +$2; or trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Swindler
text: +$2. Each other player trashes the top card of their deck and gains a card of the same cost that you choose.

name: Torturer
text: +3 Cards. Each other player either discards 2 cards or gains a Curse to their hand, their choice.

name: Trading Post
text: Trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Upgrade
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Wishing Well
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put it into your hand.

name: Bazaar
text: +1 Card. +2 Actions. +$1.

name: Caravan
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Cutpurse
text: +$2. Each other player discards a Copper from their hand (or reveals a hand with no Copper).

name: Fishing Village
text: +2 Actions. +$1. At the start of your next turn: +1 Action, +$1.

name: Ghost Ship
text: +2 Cards. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand puts cards from their hand onto their deck until they have 3 cards in hand.

name: Haven
text: +1 Card. +1 Action. Set aside a card from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Island
text: Set aside this and a card from your hand. Return them to your deck at end of game. (2VP)

name: Lighthouse
text: +1 Action. +$1. At the start of your next turn, +$1. While this is in play, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you.

name: Merchant Ship
text: +$2. At the start of your next turn, +$2.

name: Salvager
text: +1 Buy. Trash a card from your hand. +$ equal to its cost.

name: Sea Hag
text: Each other player discards the top card of their deck, then gains a Curse, putting it on top of their deck.

name: Smugglers
text: Gain a copy of a card costing up to $6 that the player to your right gained on their last turn.

name: Tactician
text: Discard your hand. If you discarded any cards, then at the start of your next turn: +5 Cards, +1 Action, +1 Buy.

name: Warehouse
text: +3 Cards. +1 Action. Discard 3 cards.

name: Wharf
text: +2 Cards. +1 Buy. At the start of your next turn: +2 Cards, +1 Buy.
